scripts.forge:test: bun run forge:deps && cargo build --release --manifest-path tools/schnorr-ffi/Cargo.toml && forge test
scripts.lint: prettier --check "./**/*.json" && prettier --check "./**/*.ts" && sh -c 'if find contracts -name "*.sol" -print -quit | grep -q .; then prettier --check "contracts/**/*.sol" && slippy "./contracts/**/*.sol"; else echo "No Solidity files found"; fi' && eslint . --ext .ts
scripts.lint-fix: prettier --write "./**/*.json" && prettier --write "./**/*.ts" && sh -c 'if find contracts -name "*.sol" -print -quit | grep -q .; then prettier --write "contracts/**/*.sol" && slippy "./contracts/**/*.sol"; else echo "No Solidity files found"; fi' && eslint . --ext .ts
scripts.lint-sol-fix: sh -c 'if find contracts -name "*.sol" -print -quit | grep -q .; then prettier --write "contracts/**/*.sol"; else echo "No Solidity files found"; fi'
scripts.slippy-check: sh -c 'if find contracts -name "*.sol" -print -quit | grep -q .; then slippy "./contracts/**/*.sol"; else echo "No Solidity files found"; fi'
